GetOutlookMailMessages.note: Retrieves Outlook mail messages. Requires Outlook connection. (dispatched via gen_from_annotation; element_tag drives emission)

MoveOutlookMessage.note: Self-closing tag. Moves an Outlook mail message to a specified folder. (dispatched via gen_from_annotation; element_tag drives emission)

SendOutlookMail.note: Sends an email via Outlook. Requires Outlook connection. (dispatched via gen_from_annotation; element_tag drives emission)

OutlookApplicationCard.note: OutlookApplicationCard is a scope activity with ActivityAction body requiring Studio configuration.

ForEachEmailX.note: ForEachEmailX iterates over emails with a dual-argument ActivityAction body requiring Studio configuration.

ExchangeScope.Body.content: ActivityAction x:TypeArguments='x:Object' with DelegateInArgument WSSessionData and Sequence Do body
